title: KDMC Launches New Digital Portal for Citizen Services
excerpt: The Kalyan-Dombivli Municipal Corporation has unveiled a comprehensive digital portal aimed at streamlining citizen services and reducing bureaucratic delays.
content:
In a significant step towards digital governance, the Kalyan-Dombivli Municipal Corporation (KDMC) has launched a new citizen services portal that promises to transform how residents interact with municipal authorities.

The portal, inaugurated by Mayor Mr. Rahul Mehta, offers over 150 services ranging from property tax payments to birth certificates, all accessible from the comfort of home.

## Key Features

- **24/7 Availability**: No more standing in queues during office hours
- **Real-time Status Tracking**: Track your applications instantly
- **Multiple Payment Options**: UPI, net banking, and card payments accepted
- **Document Upload**: Upload required documents digitally

## Implementation Timeline

The first phase covers core services including:
- Property tax payment and assessment
- Water connection and billing
- Building permission applications
- Birth and death certificates

> "This initiative aligns with our vision of making KDMC a smart city. We are committed to reducing the time and effort citizens need to spend on administrative tasks." - Mayor Rahul Mehta

The second phase, expected to launch within six months, will include road repair requests, street light complaints, and community waste management services.
author: Vijay Maniyal

title: KDMC Begins Monsoon Preparation Drive for 2026
excerpt: With the monsoon season approaching, municipal authorities have launched an extensive preparation drive to prevent waterlogging and ensure smooth drainage.
content:
As the monsoon season approaches, the Kalyan-Dombivli Municipal Corporation has launched a comprehensive preparation drive focusing on drainage system maintenance, desilting, and emergency response coordination.

## Priority Areas

The civic body has identified 45 waterlogging-prone spots across Kalyan and Dombivli, which will be addressed before the monsoons arrive.

### Drainage Desilting
- Over 200 kilometers of storm drains to be cleaned
- 1,200 manpower deployed across zones
- Mechanical desilting in narrow lanes

### Emergency Response
- 24/7 control room operational
- Emergency helpline: 9523456789
- Quick response teams on standby

> "We learned from last year's flooding incidents and have taken comprehensive measures to ensure citizen safety." - Municipal Commissioner

Residents are requested to avoid throwing garbage in drains and report blockages through the KDMC app.
author: Vijay Maniyal

title: Mumbai Metro Line 12 Gets Green Signal, to Connect Kalyan-Dombivli
excerpt: The long-awaited Mumbai Metro Line 12 connecting Kalyan to Kasarvadavali has received final approval with completion expected by 2028.
content:
Great news for commuters! The Mumbai Metro Rail Corporation (MMRC) has announced the final approval for Metro Line 12, which will significantly improve connectivity between Kalyan-Dombivli and the rest of Mumbai.

## Project Details

- **Total Length**: 20.7 kilometers
- **Stations**: 17 stations from Kalyan to Kasarvadavali
- **Estimated Cost**: ₹8,739 crores
- **Expected Completion**: 2028

### Key Stations

1. Kalyan Station (Interchange with Central Line)
2. Kalyan Plaza
3. Dombivli West
4. Dombivli East
5. Mumbra
6. And more...

The metro will reduce travel time from Kalyan to Kasarvadavali to just 35 minutes, compared to the current 90+ minutes by road during peak hours.

> "This metro line will be a game-changer for the region, connecting thousands of daily commuters to employment hubs in Mumbai." - MMRC Director

Construction is expected to begin in the third quarter of 2026.
author: Vijay Maniyal

title: KDMC Budget 2026-27: Key Highlights and Priorities
excerpt: The municipal budget for the fiscal year 2026-27 focuses on infrastructure development, healthcare, and environmental sustainability.
content:
The Kalyan-Dombivli Municipal Corporation has announced its annual budget for 2026-27 with a total outlay of ₹8,500 crores, marking a 15% increase from the previous year.

## Budget Allocation

### Major Sectors

| Sector | Allocation | Change from Last Year |
|---------|------------|----------------------|
| Infrastructure | ₹2,500 Cr | +18% |
| Healthcare | ₹1,200 Cr | +12% |
| Education | ₹800 Cr | +10% |
| Environment | ₹600 Cr | +25% |
| Social Welfare | ₹500 Cr | +8% |

### Key Initiatives

- **Green Mumbai Initiative**: Planting 1 lakh trees across the city
- **Smart Roads Project**: 100 km of roads to be upgraded with smart features
- **Healthcare Expansion**: Two new super-specialty hospitals announced
- **Digital Transformation**: ₹200 Cr allocated for smart city projects

> "This budget reflects our commitment to sustainable development while addressing the growing needs of our expanding city." - Mayor

The budget was presented by Finance Standing Committee Chairman with emphasis on fiscal prudence and transparent spending.
author: Vijay Maniyal

title: Annual Kalyan-Dombivli Marathon 2026: Registration Open
excerpt: The city gears up for its biggest sporting event of the year with categories for all age groups and fitness levels.
content:
The KDMC Sports Department has announced the 8th edition of the Kalyan-Dombivli Annual Marathon, scheduled for May 3rd, 2026. Registrations are now open for all interested participants.

## Event Categories

### Race Categories

- **Full Marathon (42.195 km)**: 5:00 AM start
- **Half Marathon (21.097 km)**: 6:00 AM start
- **10K Run**: 6:30 AM start
- **5K Fun Run**: 7:00 AM start

### Special Categories

- Senior Citizens (60+ years)
- Women-only category
- Divyangjan category
- Corporate relay teams

## Registration Details

- **Early Bird Deadline**: April 20th (20% discount)
- **Regular Registration**: April 20th - April 28th
- **Registration Fee**: ₹500 - ₹2,000 (depending on category)
- **Venue**: Kalyan Tampere Ground

> "The marathon has grown into one of the region's most anticipated sporting events. We expect over 15,000 participants this year." - Sports Director

Participants will receive a commemorative t-shirt, medal, and digital certificate. Cash prizes worth ₹25 lakhs to be distributed among top finishers.
author: Vijay Maniyal

title: Scheduled Water Supply Maintenance in Dombivli East
excerpt: Residents of Dombivli East to experience temporary water supply disruption on April 15-16 for pipeline maintenance work.
content:
The KDMC Water Department has issued a notice regarding scheduled maintenance work on the main water pipeline serving Dombivli East area.

## Maintenance Schedule

- **Date**: April 15-16, 2026
- **Time**: 10:00 PM - 6:00 AM (both days)
- **Duration**: 16 hours total

## Affected Areas

1. Ramnagar
2. Phoolpada
3. Ruiwali
4. Chanakyanagar
5. Mahendra Colony
6. Surrounding areas

## Advisory

- Store sufficient water for the maintenance period
- Avoid non-essential water usage during this time
- Municipal water tankers will be deployed to affected areas

> "This maintenance is essential to ensure uninterrupted water supply during the upcoming monsoon season." - Water Department Head

For emergency water requirements, residents can contact the helpline: 9523456700.
author: Vijay Maniyal

title: KDMC Initiates Smart Parking Project to Ease Traffic Congestion
excerpt: Multi-level smart parking facilities planned across 8 locations in Kalyan-Dombivli to address the growing parking crisis.
content:
In a major move to address parking woes, the Kalyan-Dombivli Municipal Corporation has approved a ₹350 crore smart parking project that will introduce modern, technology-enabled parking facilities across the twin city.

## Project Scope

### Planned Locations

1. **Kalyan Station Area** - 500 slots
2. **Dombivli Station West** - 400 slots
3. **Shastri Nagar** - 300 slots
4. **Khadakpada** - 350 slots
5. **Manpada Road** - 250 slots
6. **Mumbra** - 400 slots
7. **Kalyan Plaza** - 300 slots
8. **Dombivli Industrial Area** - 350 slots

## Features

- Automated parking with lift system
- Real-time slot availability display
- Mobile app integration for pre-booking
- EV charging stations
- CCTV surveillance
- Disabled-friendly design

The project is expected to be completed in phases over 24 months, with the first facility operational by early 2027.
author: Vijay Maniyal

title: KDMC Issues Guidelines for Ganesh Chaturthi Festival 2026
excerpt: Municipal authorities have released comprehensive guidelines for safe and eco-friendly Ganesh festival celebrations.
content:
With Ganesh Chaturthi approaching, the KDMC has issued detailed guidelines to ensure safe, sustainable, and joyful celebrations across Kalyan-Dombivli.

## Key Guidelines

### Environmental Guidelines

- Only eco-friendly (Shumshum, Modak) or clay Ganesh idols allowed
- No single-use plastic decorations
- Mandatory immersion in artificial tanks (not natural water bodies)
- Noise limits: 75 dB daytime, 65 dB nighttime

### Safety Requirements

- Fire safety clearance for mandals with >1000 sq ft pandals
- Electrical safety inspection mandatory
- Crowd management volunteers required
- First aid kits at all major mandals

## Artificial Immersion Tanks

The civic body has set up 45 artificial immersion tanks across the city:

- Kalyan: 20 locations
- Dombivli: 18 locations
- Mumbra: 7 locations

## Registration

All Ganesh mandals must register with KDMC by August 25th through the official website or local ward office.
author: Vijay Maniyal
